de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.hierarchy

Class TypeHierarchy

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.hierarchy.TypeHierarchy

  • public class TypeHierarchy
extends Object
    Represents the hierarchy of the Java reference types known to KeY.
    Author:
    mihai

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private List<Sort> arraySortList
      List of known array sorts.
      private Services services
      The KeY services.
      private List<Sort> sortList
      List of known java reference sorts.
      private HashMap<Sort,SortNode> sortmap
      Maps each sort to its SortNode.

      TypeHierarchy(Services services)

      Returns the parents of a sort s.

    • Field Detail

      • sortmap

        private HashMap<Sort,SortNode> sortmap
        Maps each sort to its SortNode. The SortNode contains the parents and children of the sort.

      • sortList

        private List<Sort> sortList
        List of known java reference sorts.

      • arraySortList

        private List<Sort> arraySortList
        List of known array sorts.

      • services

        private Services services
        The KeY services.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TypeHierarchy

        public TypeHierarchy(Services services)

    • Method Detail

      • getSortList

        public List<Sort> getSortList()
        Returns:
        The list of sorts in the type hierarchy.

      • getArraySortList

        public List<Sort> getArraySortList()
        Returns:
        The list of array sorts in the type hierarchy.

      • addSort

        private void addSort(Sort s)

      • getChildren

        public Set<SortNode> getChildren(Sort s)
        Returns the children of a sort s.
        Parameters:
        s - A sort s.
        Returns:
        The SortNodes containing the children of s.

      • getParents

        public Set<SortNode> getParents(Sort s)
        Returns the parents of a sort s.
        Parameters:
        s - A sort s.
        Returns:
        The SortNodes containing the parents of s.

      • removeInterfaceNodes

        public void removeInterfaceNodes()
        Removes all interface sorts from the type hierarchy. All sorts without non-interface parents become children of java.lang.Object. All other sorts are left unchanged.

      • contractNode

        private void contractNode(Sort s)
        Contracts a sort s. Removes s as child of its parents and parent of its children. The children of s become the children of all parents of s and vice-versa.
        Parameters:
        s - The sort to be contracted.

      • print

        public void print()
